name: Innodem
description: In the early Orokin Empire, elites wore Innodem as a symbolic reminder to defend the defenseless. The tradition fell out of style, but nostalgic elites acknowledged the sentiment in the form of a gift. The Void amplifies that ideal. Void energy strengthens Innodem gliding aerial attacks and the wielder is increasingly resilient as they perform finisher attacks in Incarnon Form.

components.name: Entrati Lanthorn
components.description:
A ceremonial beacon used to map Void locations on to real space.

Location: Albrecht's Laboratories (Deimos) and Zariman

components.name: Thrax Plasm
components.description:
Found in the remnants of Thrax Void manifestations, this plasm has several surprisingly practical applications.

Location: Zariman

components.name: Voidplume Pinion
components.description:
A Void Angel's living feather, ripped out in combat.

Location: Zariman

components.name: Voidplume Quill
components.description:
A symbol of genius, fallen from Void Angels long ago.

Location: Zariman

patchlogs.name: Nora’s Mix Vol.2: Hotfix 31.6.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed skins applying to the Innodem’s Incarnon mode form.

patchlogs.name: Echoes of the Zariman: Hotfix 31.6.1
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Innodem being able to equip Ceramic Dagger Rivens. 
Fixed Innodem’s mesh having issues when on the ground after being stolen away.
